RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: porter
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim hauler. Carries burdens so its master never has to.

RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: digger
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim miner. Tunnels with unsettling enthusiasm.

RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: hearth
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim cook. Keeps the pot full and the fire lit.

RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: sprout
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim planter. Tends growing things.

RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: salve
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim tender. Fusses over wounds and the wounded.

RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: scrapper
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim melee fighter. Small, fierce, and entirely too brave.

RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: vanguard
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim tank. A walking shield with opinions.

RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: quiller
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim ranged fighter. Never misses twice.

RimHeroes.MimJobDef.label: wisp
RimHeroes.MimJobDef.description: A mim spellcaster. Crackles faintly when excited.
